SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.falkordb.FalkorDB.Builder

Packages that use FalkorDB.Builder
Package
Description
com.falkordb
Core FalkorDB client API: the FalkorDB driver factory plus the Driver, Graph, and result-reading interfaces (ResultSet, Record, Header, Statistics) used to run queries and read their results.

  • Uses of FalkorDB.Builder in com.falkordb

    Methods in com.falkordb that return FalkorDB.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.builder()
    Starts building a driver with a fluent, discoverable configuration API — a superset of the driver(...) factories that also exposes TLS, connection-pool sizing, and timeouts.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.connectionTimeout(Duration connectionTimeout)
    Sets the connection (connect) timeout (default 2000 ms).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.credentials(String password)
    Sets a password for password-only (default user) authentication, clearing any previously set username.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.credentials(String user, String password)
    Sets the username and password used to authenticate.
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.host(String host)
    Sets the server host (default "localhost").
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.poolMaxIdle(int poolMaxIdle)
    Sets the maximum number of idle connections kept in the pool (default 8).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.poolMaxTotal(int poolMaxTotal)
    Sets the maximum connection-pool size (default 8).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.poolMaxWait(Duration poolMaxWait)
    Sets the maximum time to wait for a connection when the pool is exhausted (default: wait indefinitely).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.port(int port)
    Sets the server port (default 6379).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.socketTimeout(Duration socketTimeout)
    Sets the socket (read) timeout (default Duration.ZERO = no read deadline, so a long-running server query is never cut off client-side).
    FalkorDB.Builder
    FalkorDB.Builder.ssl(boolean ssl)
    Enables or disables TLS (default false).
